maxItems.title: Max Items
maxItems.description: Free users: Limited to 10 items (preview). Paid users: Optional, max 1,000,000.

keywordFilter.title: Keyword filter (optional)
keywordFilter.description: Only return apps whose slug contains this substring. Examples: seo, email, shipping, review.
keywordFilter.sectionDescription: Discovery is sitemap-based. Use the keyword filter to narrow the slugs returned.

appSlugs.title: App slugs (optional)
appSlugs.description: Specific app slugs to fetch directly (the part after apps.shopify.com/). When provided, sitemap discovery is skipped.
